title: Villager Mushroom House
description: Adds a Mushroom villager house to the mushroom fields
body:
Villager Mushroom House:

This mod adds a Mushroom villager house to the mushroom fields.

Villagers live and trade in this structure.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/034314d169cb3dbb99173b66a70458df9a55c0df.jpeg)

Inside, you’ll also find loot and a nicely decorated interior.

There is also a hidden room filled with some extra loot.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca3c754c7351ca0e5fec723668cfe200ff8d59de.jpeg)

The Structure spawns only in the Mushroom fields biome.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
